author: y4rr
content: Verified still open: conformance_serialize.rs has gguf_items_cascade_skip() that always skips. Sprint A.2 (commit 72831cae) covered mmap/sharded/async suites (#850 #851 #852) but did NOT fix GGUF. Fixture keys GgufFile/GgufMetadata/GgufTensorInfo/GgufValue/dequantize_gguf_tensor/load_gguf/load_gguf_mmap/load_gguf_state_dict/load_gguf_state_dict_mmap/parse_gguf_bytes all remain excluded. Leaving open — synthetic GGUF binary generation still required.
